name: sembl-factory-view
description: Theia panel rendering the sembl-stack factory itself: the L1-L8 pipeline strip (adapters from sembl.stack.yaml) and the run-history ribbon over .sembl/runs/ (SPEC-theia-factory-ide.md top strip + bottom ribbon, rendered as one bottom panel). Thin renderer over the run store, per O1 - no core logic here.
